plan.form.sectionBasicsHelp: Define the content, type, status and timing for the plan.
plan.form.flagsHelp: Mark useful traits so the plan is easy to recognize at a glance.
plan.form.isPaidHint: Use this when the plan requires tickets, payment or a minimum spend.
plan.form.isBookedHint: Mark it when you already have a booking, ticket or confirmation.
plan.form.isOptionalHint: Use this for flexible ideas that can be skipped if time is short.
plan.form.isImportantHint: Highlight key plans you do not want to miss during the trip.
